title: centaurea sabauda
intro: Centaurea sabauda, also known as Sardinian cornflower or mountain cornflower, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Centaurea sabauda include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Centaurea sabauda can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
